chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No.S-236 of 2025. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A.No.666/2025. 2. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 3. For hearing of main case. 22.08.2025 Mr. Imtiaz Ali Mugheri, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Bhutto, Asst. A. G a/w Inspector Hussain Ali Brohi, SHO PS Kanga & SIP Ali Dost on behalf of SSP Larkana. -.-.-.-.- Statements are filed on behalf of official respondents No.1 & 2, taken on record. Perusal of contents of petition reveals that the petitioner has got annoyance with respondent No.3 who is her husband. However, learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the petitioner has maintained family suit before Family Judge Larkana where he has not been appearing. Counsel submits that the respondent No.3 has been causing harassment to the petitioner. On query being asked by the Court, learned counsel admits that the family suit has been filed after filing of instant petition. Since main crux of the petition is protection, hence the official respondents through learned Asstt. A. G have categorically advanced that they would not cause any kind of harassment at the behest of private respondents rather would provide legal protection to the petitioner as and when she may approach to them. As far as family suit filed by the petitioner is concerned, it is yet to be adjudicated by the Court concerned after hearing either side and the parties shall be at liberty to pursue it before said Court. Petition stands disposed of along with listed application in terms stated above. Judge M.Yousuf Panhwar/**
